steps.title: Find the total number of items
steps.content:
Green items represent 25% of the total. Let T be the total number of items. Then $$0.25T = 40$$.
Solving gives $$T = \frac{40}{0.25} = 160$$.

steps.title: Calculate the number of blue items
steps.content:
Blue items are 35% of the total. So $$0.35 \times 160 = 56$$.
That matches choice D — D is correct.
